name: a-brief-history-of-intelligence
description: Max Bennett's 'A Brief History of Intelligence' — the evolution of the brain through five breakthrough innovations, from the first nervous system to the human brain, with lessons for understanding and building artificial intelligence.
useCase: Understand how intelligence evolved over 600 million years through five key breakthroughs, and apply those lessons to AI development, neuroscience, and our understanding of consciousness.
knownRisks: Simplifies complex neuroscience — not a replacement for academic study
AI comparisons are analogical, not proven mechanisms
Some claims about AI limitations may date quickly as the field advances
